title: Newerite Mod
description: Newerite Mod adds Newerite (The New Material), Newerite Tools, Newerite Barrel, Press Machine, Wood Railroads, and More. You can Turn 130 Coals into 1 Diamond By Press Machine. You can Make Better Coals With Newerite. This mod was Made in Mcreator
body:
Newerite Modification adds Newerite (The New Material), Newerite Tools, Newerite Barrel, Press Machine, Wood Railroads, and More. You can Turn 130 Coals into 1 Diamond By Press Machine. You can Make Better Coals With Newerite. This mod was Made in Mcreator. This is My First Mod. There Might be Bugs. If You Find Them Send Feedback to this Gmail Address: neweritefeedback@gmail.com You can send ideas too.

 Patreon page for supporting me: https://www.patreon.com/Masterman1988
 Mcreator Site: https://mcreator.net/modification/58385/newerite-mod
 Curseforge Site: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/newerite-mod
 Supported Languages: English(US) 

 By Newerite Modding Studios
